name: Japanese Hamburger Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute almonds in butter or margarine in a skillet until lightly browned. Remove from pan and set aside.
2. Brown beef well in the remaining butter in the skillet. Stir in water and salt, then bring to a boil.
3. Stir in noodles. Cover and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Add vegetables. Bring to a full boil over medium heat, separating vegetables with a fork and stirring frequently.
5. Cover and simmer for 3 minutes.
6. Stir in soy sauce and sprinkle with almonds. Makes 4 servings.
